body:
[1]Beto for Texas

On Sunday night, supporters at 223 grassroots watch parties across the
state tuned in to Facebook Live for a campaign update directly from Beto.
After the update, Beto did something that I’d never seen before:

He filmed our next 30-second TV ad. Like right there on Facebook. Live.
With more than 7,000 people watching in real time. And he nailed it! That
was it -- we cut it, shipped it, and now it’s on T.V. across Texas.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/9235?refcode=em20181002&t=1001&akid=14760%2E444211%2EAN5Pyl ]Click here to watch Beto’s brand-new ad, which we’re calling “Our Live
Ad,” then donate
$3
or more to keep it on the air and help us reach as many undecided Texans
as we can.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/9235?refcode=em20181002&t=1002&akid=14760%2E444211%2EAN5Pyl ]Beto for Texas

This brand-new ad is a direct response to the millions of dollars in
negative ads being launched by Ted Cruz, his special interests, PACs and
Super PACs -- ads attacking Beto and our campaign. At least TEN outside
groups have already pledged to spend millions on misleading and personal
attacks.

In “Our Live Ad,” Beto shows that our campaign is doing things
differently. Beto is committed to running a positive, inclusive campaign
that’s about listening to and learning from everyone in each of the 254
counties that he’s visited across Texas. It’s a campaign we can actually
be proud of.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/9235?refcode=em20181002&t=1003&akid=14760%2E444211%2EAN5Pyl ]We need your help keeping Beto’s brand-new ad on the airwaves. Click

today. We’ll ensure it gets put to a great use.

Thanks,

Chris Evans

#
# **_National Review: ‘The Perjury Farce’_**
#
“The case against Kavanaugh is constantly changing, but one thing has stayed the same: Democrats will make any argument, no matter how implausible or over-the-top, to try to sink him,” the _National Review_ editorial board writes. [**Click here to read more.**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDAzLjk1NzIwMzExJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAwMy45NTcyMDMxMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk0MzI1JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&100&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/national-review-perjury-farce/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=wwr) “National wage growth is at the highest it’s been in nearly 17 months — and, according to a new study released by Glassdoor, it’s not expected to slow down anytime soon,” Megan Henney reports for [**Fox Business**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDAzLjk1NzIwMzExJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAwMy45NTcyMDMxMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk0MzI1JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/fox-business-us-wage-growth-hits-17-month-high/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=wwr). “Wages grew 2.6 percent year-over-year from 2017 to $52,664, making it the fastest wage growth seen since April 2017.” Glassdoor economist Daniel Zhao added in a statement that “we expect wages to continue to rise as demand remains for workers throughout a number of industries.” The [**_New York Post_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDAzLjk1NzIwMzExJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAwMy45NTcyMDMxMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk0MzI1JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&102&&&https://nypost.com/2018/10/01/nafta-2-0-trump-delivers-on-another-big-promise/) editorial board writes that President Trump came through on another big promise by securing the United States-Mexico-Canada Agreement. “It’s hard to argue with the result,” the editors write. “Trump has once again delivered on a campaign promise that his rivals called a fantasy. A politician who does what he says he’ll do: Imagine that.” “The Trump administration’s new three-way trade deal to replace NAFTA got a thumbs-up from American farmers,” S.A. Miller writes in [**_The Washington Times_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDAzLjk1NzIwMzExJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAwMy45NTcyMDMxMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk0MzI1JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&103&&&https://www.washingtontimes.com/news/2018/oct/1/trump-trade-deal-canada-mexico-approved-us-farmers/). “Americans for Farmers & Families spokesman Casey Guernsey, a seventh-generation farmer, said the three-way deal showed Mr. Trump remembered his promise ‘to stand up for rural America.’” In the [**_Washington Examiner_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDAzLjk1NzIwMzExJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAwMy45NTcyMDMxMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk0MzI1JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&104&&&https://www.washingtonexaminer.com/opinion/how-trump-rescued-the-economy-from-obamas-failed-policies), Justin Haskins reminds readers that “just one day after Donald Trump won the 2016 presidential election, famed New York Times writer Paul Krugman wrote, ‘It really does now look like President Donald J. Trump, and markets are plunging. When might we expect them to recover? A first-pass answer is never ... So we are very probably looking at a global recession, with no end in sight.’” Haskins adds that “nearly two years later, Krugman couldn’t possibly look more foolish.”
[Privacy Policy](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDAzLjk1NzIwMzExJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAwMy45NTcyMDMxMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk0MzI1JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&105&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/privacy-policy/) | [Contact the White House](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDAzLjk1NzIwMzExJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAwMy45NTcyMDMxMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk0MzI1JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&106&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/contact) | [Unsubscribe](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDAzLjk1NzIwMzExJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAwMy45NTcyMDMxMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk0MzI1JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&107&&&https://messages.whitehouse.gov/accounts/USWH/subscriber/unsubscribe_from_topic?verification=5.de26655797f4bb6f464a5bb6e5436a0f&destination=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&topic_id=USWH_1)

body:
Peter,

Last week's hearing confirmed what we already knew: Brett Kavanaugh is not fit to sit on our nation's highest court.

As the nation watched and listened to Dr. Ford's courageous testimony, it became even more clear that we must stand up and demand the Senate vote Kavanaugh down. There is no place for him on the Supreme Court.

[**Will you join me in opposing his nomination? Add your name now to tell the Senate to reject Kavanaugh!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/E78IV0JuZmgeT6ivgxzwAvWreKXVt9bqyRqzyOOnvW4=/IsfAOicImHYllzYyiPO3uPO-ZSkKjzIx4lpqfUsoWOs=)

And with what we already know about his record of decisions against executive accountability, upholding disenfranchisement, and undermining workers' rights, there is no way we can support this nomination.

Brett Kavanaugh is wrong for the job and his nomination must be stopped. Let's make our voices loud and clear!

[**Sign on right away to tell the Senate: vote NO on Kavanaugh 's confirmation!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/E78IV0JuZmgeT6ivgxzwAvWreKXVt9bqyRqzyOOnvW4=/IsfAOicImHYllzYyiPO3uPO-ZSkKjzIx4lpqfUsoWOs=)

Thanks for taking action.

Mike

name: Grace H. [field organizer]
subject: We need your help this weekend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Klobuchar for Minnesota
body:
Hi,
The biggest midterm election in a generation is only a few weeks away -- and we need your help to make sure Minnesota continues to have one of the highest voter turnout rates in the nation.
**[You can help this weekend -- click to sign up for a shift in your local office.](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=HtuYZ%2FGnqiTrrjC0W2VsyhSWpLlL0vdW)**
The truth is that Minnesotans are already voting -- and **we need your help right now.**
More Minnesotans vote than in almost any other state, but that's because thousands of people like you do the work of talking to your neighbors about why voting matters and how easy it is to vote.
We don't have many weekends left. That's why we're planning a HUGE weekend of action across Minnesota. **[You can volunteer by signing up for a shift online.](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=2%2FmCOvqNVGg2lJn8QrqnWxSWpLlL0vdW)**
I hope to see you soon.
\-- Grace

Friends,
**We need more women like Molly Kelly in office.**
She's running to fight for all the issues that matter most to the people of New Hampshire: access to affordable health care, protecting the rights of women and getting the corruption of dark money out of politics.
**I know you and I can count on Molly to stand up for women and working families because, unlike Governor Chris Sununu, her campaign is fueled by grassroots supporters like you - not corporate special interests.**
But that means she's depending on you to help her defend herself against dark-money groups, like the Koch network, who are spending big to defeat her and keep their friend Sununu in office. **That's why her team needs to raise $15,000 by midnight tonight to make sure they can ****fight back and win. **

October has arrived, and here at _**your**_**** Indiana Republican Party that means we are headed into overdrive.

Just a few days from today, we'll kick off the FINAL 30-day push to Election Day!

As you know we've made incredible gains in Indiana in recent election cycles, and our elected Republicans are keeping us on the RIGHT track by getting BIG things done.

**Our strong GOP Congressional Delegation -from Senator Todd Young to your local Republican Member of Congress - has been working hard alongside President Trump and Vice President Pence** to get big results for Indiana and the nation. Here at home, Governor Eric Holcomb and our super majorities in the Statehouse are making Indiana the BEST place in America to live, work, start a business, raise a family, and retire!

[**_We can't let up! body:

| | This campaign isn't doing well -- **we're doing fantastic, team.** Going into the final month of this campaign, our grassroots team is stronger, bigger, and better than ever. We've knocked on over 20,000 doors. We've called over 100,000 voters. We've recruited over 600 volunteers. We've traveled thousands of miles across North Carolina's beautiful 13th District, held over 350 events, including town hall meetings and neighborhood meet and greets with voters at their homes, favorite diners, and small businesses. We have Kathy on the road, every day, talking to people and spreading the word about this campaign. **And thanks to all of you, we crushed our FEC goal.** Such success attracts attention. Not one, not two, _but three_ national media outlets have upgraded the competitiveness of this race. You know that Congressman Budd's special interest friends will see the coverage, get nervous, and attack us in the final month. But right now, momentum is on our side -- and that's largely thanks to all of your hard work and support. **Thank you, everyone, for your energy and effort.** If we keep this up, we can make sure that on Election Day, Kathy becomes our next Congresswoman. subject: We can stop Kavanaugh. Here's how.
body:
Here's what we do to stop Kavanaugh. | | | [](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/BubPp/6/t6/r5cs/6f5XBY/sOACW0fwwz/P/P) |
---|---
| | Activist,

It’s go time. These next 48 hours are critical to stopping Kavanaugh.

Today, GOP senators announced the FBI “investigation” is almost complete — despite the fact that the FBI has not even contacted Dr. Blasey Ford or Brett Kavanaugh.

The Republicans know that most Americans **do not** want to see Kavanaugh on the Supreme Court. They’re trying to rush to a vote and catch us off guard.

But we’re on guard. We’re ready. This fight is NOT over.

Here's what we do:
|
---|---
| | |
---|---
| | |
---|---
| |
**1\. Show up in Washington, D.C. and tell senators to #BelieveSurvivors**

If you’re able, get yourself to Washington, D.C., _[where we’ll be rallying tomorrow at 12:30pm](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/BubPp/s/pc/r5cs/6f5XBY/G3Wjh0nj8/P/P "Link: https://www.facebook.com/events/190719465177341/")_. There will be ongoing actions at the Capitol on Thursday and Friday, including telling senators to #BelieveSurvivors. Last week we saw how the courage of two women changed Jeff Flake’s mind. Now, we bring that power to all of our senators.

**2\. Flood. The. Phone. Lines. CALL: 844-766-2707**

Keep up the pressure — it’s working. These are the senators that most need to hear from us:

**Susan Collins - MAINE**
**Lisa Murkowski - ALASKA**
**Joe Manchin - WEST VIRGINIA
Jeff Flake - ARIZONA
Heidi Heitkamp - NORTH DAKOTA**
Tell them they need to believe survivors. Tell them Kavanaugh is a national disgrace, and you do NOT want to see him on the Supreme Court.
**CALL NOW: 844-766-2707**

**3\. Support _[this GoFundMe](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/BubPp/v/pX/r5cs/6f5XBY/vkgjgPNY09/P/P "Link: http://bit.ly/webelieveall")_ for Dr. Blasey Ford, Deborah Ramirez, and Julie Swetnick.**

These women are courageously putting everything on the line for us. Let's support them by assisting with their legal and security expenses. All funds raised will go directly to the women pursuant to their instructions. This is a tangible way to support — please help if you can.

Together, we will win this.

In solidarity,
Bob Fertik, Democrats.com
Heidi Sieck, #VOTEPROCHOICE

| | I've told you before about the pin I wear on my lapel -- a yellow canary in a cage. It's more than an accessory Peter. Miners used to bring canaries into the mines to check for dangerous levels of gas. If the canary died, they knew to get out of the mine. Back then, there were no formal protections for those workers. So they banded together to fight for the right to collectively bargain. A steelworker from Local 1104 gave me the canary pin at a Workers' Memorial Day rally in Lorain, Ohio. It's been years since I got it, but I've worn it ever since. It reminds of every hardworking man and woman in America, the families they support, and how critical it is for me and for this grassroots team to keep fighting for each of them. | |

The White House • October 3, 2018
## Ivanka Trump: NASCAR students on the fast track
##
##
**From the small town of Tallapoosa, Georgia** —just 45 minutes from the legendary Talladega track—Brandall Brown was born with “racing in his blood.” His childhood hero was Jeff Gordon, and Brown vividly remembers annual visits to the Daytona USA museum, beginning at age five. **Just five days after he graduated** from high school this May, Brown moved to North Carolina to start classes at NASCAR Technical Institute.**** “I’m pursing my dream,” he says. **Today, Advisor to the President Ivanka Trump** traveled to Mooresville, North Carolina, visiting that same NASCAR Technical Institute alongside Daytona 500 winner Austin Dillon. She met with students like Brown and spoke about an issue close to her heart: job training to help American workers and American families get ahead. She also visited parts of the region affected by Hurricane Florence last month. **Ms. Trump has been a key advocate** for workforce development in the White House, helping shepherd the bipartisan Perkins Career and Technical Education (CTE) Act through Congress earlier this year. Perkins CTE is the primary Federal funding source to help prepare students and workers for jobs in a 21st-century economy. **America’s skills gap** is driven by a myth that there is a single pathway to economic success: four-year college. “The reality is that we have to rethink fundamentally human potential,” Ms. Trump said today. “We can’t have kids that are leaving university without skills that are loaded up with student debt.” **In response to this challenge** , President Trump created the [**Pledge to America’s Workers**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDAzLjk1NzU1MjExJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAwMy45NTc1NTIxMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk0NzM2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&100&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/pledge-to-americas-workers/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d), which has resulted in more than 4 million new opportunities since July. [**Ivanka Trump: Training Americans for the jobs of tomorrow**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDAzLjk1NzU1MjExJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAwMy45NTc1NTIxMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk0NzM2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/articles/training-jobs-tomorrow/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d)
## President Trump presents the Medal of Honor
##
**Yesterday, President Trump awarded our nation’s highest honor** to then-Staff Sergeant Ronald J. Shurer for his heroic actions while serving in the U.S. Army.**** **On April 6, 2008,** Shurer and members of his team were pinned down on a mountainside under heavy enemy fire. Shurer fought his way across a barrage of bullets to treat and rescue wounded soldiers, using his body to shield others from ongoing fire and debris. He carried the wounded down the mountainside, and after loading the soldiers into an evacuation helicopter, retook control of his commando squad and rejoined the fight. **Shurer’s heroic actions** saved the lives of many that day. **Ron “is an inspiration** to everyone in this room and to every citizen all across our great land,” President Trump said at yesterday’s ceremony. “Ron, our hearts are filled with gratitude and joy as we prepare to engrave your name alongside of America’s greatest heroes.” **A year and a half ago** , Shurer was diagnosed with cancer—but that hasn’t dampened his resolve one bit. “He’s been fighting it every single day with courage and with strength,” the President said. “He’s a warrior. He’s a warrior.” **[Watch President Trump present the Congressional Medal of Honor](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDAzLjk1NzU1MjExJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAwMy45NTc1NTIxMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk0NzM2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&102&&&https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1047159010632355842).** **Read more** : [**Ronald Shurer’s heroic story**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDAzLjk1NzU1MjExJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAwMy45NTc1NTIxMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk0NzM2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&103&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/president-donald-j-trump-award-medal-honor-5/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d)

He carried the wounded down the mountainside, and after loading the soldiers into an evacuation helicopter, retook control of his commando squad and rejoined the fight. Shurer’s heroic actions saved the lives of many that day. Ron “is an inspiration to everyone in this room and to every citizen all across our great land,” President Trump said at yesterday’s ceremony. “Ron, our hearts are filled with gratitude and joy as we prepare to engrave your name alongside of America’s greatest heroes.” A year and a half ago , Shurer was diagnosed with cancer—but that hasn’t dampened his resolve one bit. “He’s been fighting it every single day with courage and with strength,” the President said. “He’s a warrior. He’s a warrior.” . subject: FWD: Fifty $100 Donations by Friday
body:
Derek, Did you see Finance Chairman Jim Morgan's email yesterday? It's imperative that we raise the crucial resources needed to support our Republican Party this November. With your donations, the NHGOP will be able to send out mail, create and print campaign materials, and support our grassroots efforts to get Republicans to the polls in November. [Will you join the growing list of VIP donors who will join in our efforts?](http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=3qP3xl6Iy86fMdiFlFopyNzLRbZLRvqwhQZnD-2FhFDc94UKlsSlCONej2URievwx-2F_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30MZtlRvoKcF83zFx0I5KcQpGj4G8FqespY71vR87C1i9L9TwsR-2F4lOIAeLw7icWzJZ0cgI-2BI8O1XQYoIXJz-2BXOQOw2Us7Ce9TWfXEgI4hJGP71SSnosb0ZY-2Bh1O-2BREbRT-2Btoh-2BxOfqXxoqd-2BZ0VG-2FKVdBRqfBQnEsKTGHH1bo42Atr5xifP-2BSez7mNtnI5D-2FR0eiUjH1-2BlxoC2zvk2hP6egY62H6Wgdi1TcdZfEzdpf-2F5ZOb-2BhMICWX7Anqni5l4i4a1vhRhb7G-2BbtdM1VA6WiNg-3D-3D) Sincerely, Todd CheewingNHGOP Executive Director \--- Derek, I am writing to ask for your action and attention to our future success in New Hampshire. As a CEO and employer in our state, I am seeing the New Hampshire Advantage threatened. Molly Kelly wants to roll back all the work Gov. Sununu has done and will do for taxes, workforce development and opportunities for business growth in New Hampshire. As your Republican Party Finance Chair, we need your support on all fronts to stop this - and Gov. Sununu to remain in the Corner Office. The success of his first two years must continue if we have any hopes of keeping taxes low and opportunities bright. As a business leader, ensuring New Hampshire's opportunities stay vibrant is so important. I promise that your support will not be wasted, that your vote will be heard and New Hampshire will continue to add to our successes. Friends,

On Election Day, voters won't just be choosing between Mayor Andrew Gillum and Ron DeSantis -- they'll be choosing between two very different visions for the state of Florida.

Mayor Gillum believes in a state where everyday people have access to affordable healthcare, great public schools, and a clean, healthy environment -- while Ron DeSantis believes in Donald Trump and corporate special interests.

**[But this newest rating change shows that Floridians are ready for a leader who will move our state forward. Will you chip in $5 to help us keep the momentum going?](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36a8/9e00690/5ea9682f/2401f287/47818138/VEsEBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-ratings-change-tiltd?gpsid=13_55_4045&refcode=em18_181003_RateRR_fnd_gq_kicker_nono__TG_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181003_RateRR_fnd_gq_kicker_nono__TG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&recur_weekly=yes&utm_content=20+-+But+this+newest+rating+change+shows+that")**

subject: What our campaign means to me 💕
body:
“Hi, it’s Claudia, with the Ian Todd Campaign!”

That’s how I’ve been introducing myself to everyone I’ve met for almost an entire year, to say that this campaign has become a big part of who I am is a bit of an understatement. This campaign has been an incredible challenge and the greatest adventure, I’ve gotten to work alongside some of the best people I will ever know, had life-changing conversations, and shaped my own voice as a young, progressive, queer latina. It’s hard to believe it will all be over just a month from now.

Of course, it won’t ALL be over, I’m pleased to say that everything we’ve worked for together will outlive our campaign. Together we have reached thousands of voters, that’s thousands of people who have heard Ian’s message of working together to restore integrity and inclusivity in politics. That message is here to stay, no matter what happens this November, we could not have amplified it without your help and I am so grateful for all of your hard work and support.

I’m thrilled to see how all of our work pays off on Election Day.

Donate today (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/iantodd?refcode=claudia3Oct&amount=100&utm_source=Newsletter&utm_campaign=dd4b66b107-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2018_10_03_08_20&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_28710cd7a6-dd4b66b107-9291445) to help us make each of these last few days before the election count.

clean_body: “Hi, it’s Claudia, with the Ian Todd Campaign!” That’s how I’ve been introducing myself to everyone I’ve met for almost an entire year, to say that this campaign has become a big part of who I am is a bit of an understatement. This campaign has been an incredible challenge and the greatest adventure, I’ve gotten to work alongside some of the best people I will ever know, had life-changing conversations, and shaped my own voice as a young, progressive, queer latina. It’s hard to believe it will all be over just a month from now. Of course, it won’t ALL be over, I’m pleased to say that everything we’ve worked for together will outlive our campaign. Together we have reached thousands of voters, that’s thousands of people who have heard Ian’s message of working together to restore integrity and inclusivity in politics. That message is here to stay, no matter what happens this November, we could not have amplified it without your help and I am so grateful for all of your hard work and support. I’m thrilled to see how all of our work pays off on Election Day. Donate today () to help us make each of these last few days before the election count.
